takeaways: X's text search only matches the literal path 'x.com/i/chat/group_join' — keyword combos like 'crypto' or 'DeFi' return tweets that mention crypto AND happen to contain the substring, which yields 0 actual links.
Most invite tweets are short replies; original-tweet filter (-filter:replies) cuts the pool to almost nothing.

Best path forward to grow the directory: (1) submission form with light moderation, (2) targeted outreach to XChat-active creators in each category, (3) look for invite QR codes posted as images (different scraper).
decision: No new groups added in this round — all 4 unseeded candidates fail quality bar.
